global.description: The ad features a bold red background with a prominent logo and call-to-action.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' is prominently displayed in bold, black font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A stylized representation of a mobile app interface, shown as a simple outline in the center.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A decorative zigzag shape in a lighter red color positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Hungry? We got you
elements.description: A bold, white headline text that reads 'Hungry? We got you' centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: A smaller white text below the headline that says 'Fresh favorites nearby'.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Book now' at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by an app screenshot in the center, and the headline and CTA at the bottom.
